current_focus: The first local Next.js dashboard MVP is implemented and verified against this repository's .agent-dashboard files; next work should add stronger fixture tests, sync-safety enforcement, and product-specific context.

completed_work.title: Initialize project coordination dashboard
completed_work.summary: Created the dashboard directory structure, protocol files, starter project context, reports, one run report, and one thread summary.
verification: Confirmed the project directory had no existing dashboard files before creation.
Created every required path listed in the setup request.
Reviewed file inventory after setup.
Parsed all JSON dashboard files successfully.

completed_work.summary: Added session start, end-of-task reporting, status definitions, done criteria, conflict rules, and security rules to AGENTS.md.

Confirmed no recent overlapping active work.

Confirmed AGENTS.md contains the requested protocol sections.

completed_work.summary: Audited recent run and thread reports for conflicting claims, duplicate work, overlapping changed files, stale current-status fields, missing prompts, and verification gaps.

Updated consolidated dashboard reporting state.

completed_work.title: Standardize dashboard report schemas
completed_work.summary: Defined TypeScript-compatible schemas, canonical statuses, legacy status migration rules, existing-report warnings, and migration guidance for dashboard parser support.
verification: Read all files under .agent-dashboard before editing.
Updated report-schema.md and status-taxonomy.md.
All dashboard JSON files parsed successfully after schema updates.
Confirmed report-schema.md contains all requested TypeScript-compatible interfaces.

completed_work.title: Prepare dashboard reporting for future mobile sync
completed_work.summary: Documented the future mobile sync architecture, sync entities, redaction rules, private mode, append-only run handling, derived current status, and read-only-first mobile constraints.
verification: Read report-schema.md, current-status.json, goals/main.yaml, and recent run reports before editing.
Created docs/mobile-sync-plan.md.
Created .agent-dashboard/protocol/sync-safety-rules.md.
Confirmed documentation covers requested source, desktop viewer, future backend, read-only mobile, sync entities, redaction, private mode, and conflict rules.
All dashboard JSON files parsed successfully after mobile sync preparation.

completed_work.title: Connect project to GitHub and push
completed_work.summary: Initialized Git, connected origin to https://github.com/Bum-Boo/Codes-Project-Viewer.git, committed the dashboard project, and pushed main to origin.
verification: Remote origin is set to https://github.com/Bum-Boo/Codes-Project-Viewer.git.
Initial commit 399e0306d80318be83cf92a3d2df6d0de754dc49 was pushed to origin/main.
git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main returned the pushed commit hash.
All dashboard JSON files parsed successfully after writing the GitHub push report.

completed_work.title: Add English GitHub repository description
completed_work.summary: Set the GitHub repository description to an English summary of the project dashboard protocol.
verification: gh repo view initially showed an empty description.
gh repo edit set the repository description.
gh repo view confirmed the new description.
All dashboard JSON files parsed successfully after writing the GitHub description report.

completed_work.title: Implement first local dashboard MVP
completed_work.summary: Built a local-first Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind dashboard that reads this repository's .agent-dashboard files, normalizes legacy statuses, displays project state, and reports parser warnings.
verification: npm run typecheck passed.
npm run build passed.
Production server on http://localhost:3000 returned expected dashboard sections: Project Status, Current Focus, Completed Work, Remaining Work, Blockers, Recent Runs, and Latest Report.

remaining_work.title: Implement local dashboard parser and sync-safety enforcement
remaining_work.summary: The local dashboard MVP now reads core .agent-dashboard files and normalizes legacy statuses. It does not yet enforce sync-safety-rules.md or provide fixture-based parser tests.

remaining_work.title: Replace starter context with product-specific details
remaining_work.summary: The initial context describes the coordination protocol, not a product or application domain.

remaining_work.title: Provide actual task details
remaining_work.summary: An earlier implementation request contained placeholder task text instead of actionable instructions.

blockers.summary: No implementation can proceed on the placeholder task until actual work instructions are provided.

findings: Older reports use legacy statuses that now require migration normalization.
thread-index.json is stale and does not include all newer Markdown thread summaries.
Several threads touched shared reporting files such as HANDOFF.md, latest.md, and current-status.json.

next_recommended_prompts: Implement a dashboard parser that reads .agent-dashboard using the schemas in protocol/report-schema.md and normalizes legacy statuses.
Implement a dashboard parser that enforces protocol/sync-safety-rules.md before any cloud sync.
Replace the placeholder task body with a concrete narrow task and ask Codex to proceed under AGENTS.md.
Update PROJECT_BRIEF.md with the actual product scope and target users.
